description: Brazilian criminal organization based in Bahia, founded in 2015 by Alexandre (Xandeco) and others as an offshoot of the defunct Caveira faction. Specializes in drug trafficking, robberies, kidnappings, and murders. Currently the largest criminal organization in Bahia, with an estimated 15,000 members and allied with the Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC).

country_links.evidence_quote: expanded its operations to the states of Sergipe , Goiás , and Alagoas
country_links.context: The organization expanded its operations to the state of Alagoas.
